dailyNews.title: Edward Russo Says Donald Trump Is an ‘Environmental Hero’

dailyNews.title: Trump Posts Video of Presidential Library in Miami
dailyNews.description: President Trump posted a video rendering that appeared to include elements generated by artificial intelligence of a skyscraper in Miami featuring what appeared to be Air Force One.

dailyNews.title: Medicaid cuts threaten hundreds of hospitals, new report finds

dailyNews.title: Trump lashes out at UK and France, telling allies 'the U.S.A. won't be there to help you anymore'

dailyNews.title: Army investigates helicopter flyby at Kid Rock's Nashville home
dailyNews.description: Kid Rock is a leading supporter of President Donald Trump, the subject of "No Kings" demonstrations around the U.S. on the day the helicopters showed up.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.
